title: CVE-2026-43494: Linux Kernel RCE
summary: [P1] A vulnerability in the Linux kernel may allow for remote code execution, with no patch currently available. This vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild, but its presence in the Linux kernel makes it a high-risk item. Why now: The vulnerability's presence in the Linux kernel makes it a high-risk item. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability affects the Linux kernel, which is a foundational component.
